eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Fresno; Monterey; San Benito; San Luis Obispo; Santa Clara, CA; at 10:11 PM ON MAR 23, 2026 Effective until 12:11 AM MAR 24, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
AN AMBER ALERT IS BEING ISSUED BY THE CALIFORNIA HIGHWAY PATROL ON BEHALF OF THE MONTEREY POLICE DEPARTMENT.

ON MARCH 23, 2026, AT 7 08 PM, CORBIN HUTCHENS WAS ABDUCTED FROM MONTEREY, CALIFORNIA. CORBIN HUTCHENS IS A 4 YEAR OLD WHITE MALE, WITH BROWN HAIR AND BROWN EYES.

THE SUSPECT, DANIEL HUTCHENS, IS A 40 YEAR OLD WHITE MALE, STANDING 5 FEET 10 INCHES TALL, WEIGHING 200 POUNDS WITH BROWN HAIR AND BROWN EYES.

THE SUSPECT AND VICTIM ARE BELIEVED TO BE ON FOOT.

IF SEEN CALL 9 1 1
